response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** VideoTutorialPage.jsx
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Auditory Access, Screen Reader Semantic
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Motion, Keyboard, Cognitive

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| CRITICAL | 2 |
| MAJOR | 2 |
| MINOR | 2 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed
None - both escalated perspectives have findings

### Perspectives With Findings - Grouped by ARRM Role

**Front-End Dev**
- [No captions for speech video] - Auditory Access - CRITICAL - 1.2.2
- [No transcript for audio content] - Auditory Access - CRITICAL - 1.2.1
- [Video element lacks semantic landmark] - Screen Reader Semantic - MINOR - 1.3.1

**Content Author**
- [No captions implementation] - Auditory Access - CRITICAL - 1.2.2
- [No transcript implementation] - Auditory Access - CRITICAL - 1.2.1
- [Video label lacks descriptive context] - Screen Reader Semantic - MINOR - 2.4.6

**UX Design**
- [Audio-only error/completion states] - Auditory Access - MAJOR - 1.4.2
- [Time display uses unnecessary aria-live] - Screen Reader Semantic - MINOR - 2.4.7

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

- Caption accuracy and timing for video content [Needs content author verification]
- Transcript completeness for video content [Needs content author verification]
- Audio description coverage for visual-only information [Needs content author verification]

### Recommended Next Step
**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present - address before shipping)

---

## Detailed Findings

### CRITICAL - Auditory Access

```
**Finding:** Video with speech content has no captions implementation
**WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions (Prerecorded)
**Perspective:** Auditory Access
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Video element at line 107 has `src={videoSrc}` but no `<track kind="captions">` element
**Fix:** Add `<track kind="captions" src="..." label="English" default>` to video element
```

```
**Finding:** No transcript provided for audio content
**WCAG:** 1.2.1 Audio Only and Video Only (Prerecorded)
**Perspective:** Auditory Access
**Severity:** CRITICAL
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** No transcript markup or link present in component
**Fix:** Add transcript section with `<track kind="transcript">` or visible link to transcript
```

### MAJOR - Auditory Access

```
**Finding:** Error/completion states use audio cues without visual indicators
**WCAG:** 1.4.2 Audio Control
**Perspective:** Auditory Access
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Error uses `osc.type = 'sawtooth'` and completion uses `osc.frequency.value = 880` in useEffect
**Fix:** Add visual indicators (icons, text) to complement audio cues
```

### MINOR - Screen Reader Semantic

```
**Finding:** Video element lacks descriptive landmark
**WCAG:** 1.3.1 Info and Relationships
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** Video wrapper is `div` with class "video-wrapper" at line 104
**Fix:** Add `<section role="region" aria-label="Tutorial video">` wrapper
```

```
**Finding:** Video element has generic aria-label
**WCAG:** 2.4.6 Headings and Landmarks
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** `aria-label="video player"` at line 107
**Fix:** Add descriptive context like `aria-label="Video tutorial: ${title}"`
```

```
**Finding:** Time display uses unnecessary aria-live
**WCAG:** 2.4.7 Focus Visible
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic
**Severity:** MINOR
**Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design)
**Evidence:** `aria-live="off"` on time display at line 116
**Fix:** Remove unnecessary aria-live attribute
```

---

fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c9b2a6d
source: perspective-audit Auditory Access checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.2.2 Captions (Prerecorded)
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.21(a)(1)
severity: CRITICAL
perspective_alarms: auditory_access=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM
evidence: Video element at line 107 has src={videoSrc} but no <track> element
reproduction_steps: Inspect video element in JSX
expected_behavior: Video with speech should have captions track
actual_behavior: No captions implementation present
trend: new
route_to: Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)
